title: Neethaane Naal Thorum Song Lyrics Paattu Vaathiyar
stanzas:
Neethaane Naal Thorum Song Lyrics Paattu Vaathiyar
#Ilaiyaraaja

Andru itaa thee muppurathile
kondrazhithathu theeya sakthiyai
indru itta thee ippurathile
enna thaan seyyumo
aadhi sakthiye

neethaane naal thorum
naan paadak kaaranam
nee endhan nenjodu
nindraadum thoranam
nee indru naan paada
vaeredhu keerthanam

ilamai kaalam thodangi
endhan mudhumai
kaalam varaiyil
isaikkum geetham thaniye
indru iruppathenna sirayil

neethaane naal thorum
naan paadak kaaranam
nee endhan nenjodu
nindraadum thoranam

thoodhu sellavum
seidhi sollavum
naadhiyindri naaney.
paadugindravai
kaadhil kaetkumo
poriyil veelndha maaney.

kadhal enabathe
paavam enbathaai
theerppu sonnathaaro.
thooya kadhalai
thoora thalliye
theeyai moottuvaaro

vanji poovum vazhumo
illail theeyil vegumo
dharma niyayam pesidum
deivam oomai aagumo
kanmani ponmani
ingu naan angu nee

neethaane naal thorum
naan paadak kaaranam
nee endhan nenjodu
nindraadum thoranam

deivam kaakka vendiye
kaiyai naanum yendhinen.
pitchai yaedhum indriye
thunba aatril neendhinen

innum yaen thaamatham
theerka vaa sanjalam
kaakkum kaigal
vandhe ingu
kanneer thudaikkaadho

neethaane naal thorum
naan paadak kaaranam
nee endhan nenjodu
nindraadum thoranam
nee indru naan paada
vaeredhu keerthanam

ilamai kaalam thodangi
endhan mudhumai
kaalam varaiyil
isaikkum geetham thaniye
indru iruppathenna sirayil

neethaane naal thorum
naan paadak kaaranam
nee endhan nenjodu
nindraadum thoranam

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep emotions of love and longing, highlighting the connection between the lovers.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Paattu Vaathiyar, the song reflects the protagonist's feelings and the romantic moments shared with their beloved.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the melodious voices of K.J. Yesudhas and Swarnalatha.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Neethaane Naal Thorum was composed by the legendary Ilaiyaraaja.

When was this song released?

This song was released on February 10, 1995.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Neethaane Naal Thorum, the protagonist expresses their heartfelt emotions through a beautiful melody that resonates with love and longing. The song captures the essence of romantic moments, making it a perfect fit for weddings and anniversaries. With its soothing composition by Ilaiyaraaja and the soulful voices of K.J. Yesudhas and Swarnalatha, it evokes a sense of nostalgia and deep emotional connection. This timeless classic continues to be cherished by fans of Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Neethaane Naal Thorum from Paattu Vaathiyar is a timeless melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of K.J. Yesudhas and Swarnalatha, this song is a perfect blend of Ilaiyaraaja's masterful composition and heartfelt lyrics. Experience the emotional depth and soothing vibes that make this track a classic in Tamil cinema.
stanzaMeanings: Once, the fire that was in the past had a powerful energy. Today, what can this fire do? The original power remains.
You are the reason I sing every day. You are the one who stays in my heart, and today I have a different song to sing.
The song that plays from my youth until my old age is now alone in this prison.
You are the reason I sing every day. You are the one who stays in my heart.
I am the one who speaks and conveys messages without a voice. Can anyone hear the one who sings in the fields?
Is love a sin? Did they say it can be resolved? Will pure love push away the fire?
The flower that blooms is not there, nor is there a path. In the fire, will justice speak? God, will you become silent here?
Will you and I meet again?
You are the reason I sing every day. You are the one who stays in my heart.
Is there no temple? Is there no God? To remove the burden,
Is there no strength? Is there no heart? To unite us as one,
The God who watches over us sees everything with his eyes.
In this time of decline, who will we ask for love?
I have raised my hand to protect God. I have slept without any worries in the burden of suffering.
Why is it still not resolved? Come, the hands that protect the net are here, will tears not flow?
You are the reason I sing every day. You are the one who stays in my heart, and today I have a different song to sing.
The song that plays from my youth until my old age is now alone in this prison.
You are the reason I sing every day. You are the one who stays in my heart.
